program: Business English — Executive Communication for International Leadership
hub_subtitle: Business English Executivo para Reuniões Internacionais e Liderança

lesson.menu_desc: Introducing yourself and your role as CEO of AVRT -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 1 -- Mapping Your Executive Voice -- Introducing Yourself and Your Role
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Izabel Cristina de Pieri | Aula 1 -- Mapping Your Executive Voice

listenings.text: Hi Izabel, it's Andy. I'm just calling to confirm a few things before Thursday's call. First, I'd like you to walk us through the cash flow for the last month, and then give us a quick update on the ERP project. A couple of the new partners will be on the line, so it's a good chance for them to hear directly from you. The call runs for about forty minutes, and we start at ten your time. If anything comes up before then, just send me a message. Thanks, Izabel. Talk to you Thursday.

Good morning, everyone. For those who don't know me yet, my name is Rachel, and I'm the new operations advisor for the Latin America accounts. I've spent the last twelve years working with technology companies, mostly in supply chain and finance. On a daily basis, I deal with our regional partners and I report directly to the board. I'm really looking forward to working with the team in Brazil. Please feel free to reach out anytime. My door is always open, and I'm happy to help wherever I can. Thank you.
